issues.title: No click-to-filter interaction between charts
issues.description: Clicking a bar in the 'Most Common Types' chart does not filter the 'Arrest Rate by Type' chart. A data analyst expects linked views.
issues.expected: Clicking a bar in one chart highlights or filters that type in the other chart

issues.title: Table is not sortable by arrest rate
issues.description: The 'All Crime Types' table has columns for Type, Count, and Arrest Rate, but clicking column headers does not sort.
issues.actual: No sorting functionality; table is static

summary: Crime Types page shows correct data but charts are not interactive and table lacks sorting.
